abilities.name: poison-point
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being poisoned.
abilities.flavorText: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

abilities.name: sniper
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon inflicts triple damage with critical hits, rather than the usual double damage.
abilities.flavorText: If the Pokémon's attack lands a critical hit, the attack is powered up even further.

abilities.name: damp
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
abilities.effect: While this Pokémon is in battle, Self-Destruct and Explosion will fail and Aftermath will not take effect.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.
